dashboard.title: Good morning
dashboard.subtitle: Here's what's happening across your spaces today.

search.title: Find a Resource
search.subtitle: Search across rooms, vehicles, and equipment.
search.tryAgain: Try another time slot or relax the filters.

booking.title: Booking title
booking.qr: Scan this QR at the room to check in
booking.successDesc: An invite is on its way to your inbox.
booking.pendingDesc: We'll email you when it's reviewed.

myBookings.title: My Bookings
myBookings.subtitle: Upcoming, pending, and recently past reservations.

approvals.title: Approvals
approvals.subtitle: Review bookings that need your sign-off.
approvals.emptyDesc: When someone requests a room you approve, it'll appear here.
approvals.rejectHelp: The requester will be notified with your reason.
approvals.reasonPh: Conflicting maintenance / room unavailable / outside policy…

approvalChain.title: Approval chain
approvalChain.subtitle: Configure multi-level approval policies for sensitive bookings.
approvalChain.name: Rule name
approvalChain.emptyDesc: Add a rule and any matching booking will be routed through your chain instead of single-step approval.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.subtitle: Receive HMAC-signed event callbacks for downstream automation.
webhooks.eventsHelp: Select which events should fire a POST. We re-send up to 5 times with exponential backoff (30s → 2h).
webhooks.emptyDesc: Subscribe an external system to receive booking lifecycle events.
webhooks.secretBody: Use it to verify the X-MRBS-Signature header on every incoming POST. We will not show it again.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect Microsoft 365, Teams, Google and Zoom — bookings push to room mailboxes automatically.
integrations.msDesc: Push bookings to Outlook room mailboxes via Microsoft Graph. Use the OAuth2 client-credentials flow with Calendars.ReadWrite + User.Read.All app permissions.
integrations.teamsDesc: Search and book rooms from a Teams chat compose box. Download the manifest, side-load it, and point the bot endpoint at https://your-host/api/v1/teams/messages.
integrations.secretHelp: Stored obfuscated; never returned in subsequent API responses.
integrations.step1: Register an application in Azure AD (Microsoft Entra → App registrations → New).
integrations.step2: Under API permissions add Calendars.ReadWrite + User.Read.All as Application permissions and grant admin consent.
integrations.step3: Under Certificates & secrets create a Client Secret value (copy it immediately, it's shown only once).
integrations.step4: Paste the directory (tenant) ID, application (client) ID, and the secret value above and Save.
integrations.step5: Click Test connection. Then map each room resource to a mailbox UPN under the Room mailboxes tab.
integrations.mailboxesHelp: Map each bookable resource to its Outlook room mailbox UPN. Only mapped resources sync.
integrations.confirmRemoveMapping: Remove this mapping? Future bookings won't sync to that mailbox.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.subtitle: Configure what each role in this tenant can do. The 5 built-in roles still gate menu visibility, but every action is checked against this matrix.
permissions.help: Changes apply on save. Users may need to refresh their token (logout / login) before reduced permissions take effect.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Usage, utilisation, and audit data — exportable for any time window.
reports.usageHelp: Per-resource booking counts, utilisation hours, peak time. CSV is human-readable; XLSX is styled for stakeholders.
reports.realtimeHelp: Operational dashboards from Prometheus and the API metrics endpoint.

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Your session, language, theme, and identity attributes from this tenant's directory.

scim.title: SCIM 2.0 provisioning
scim.subtitle: Issue tokens that Azure AD (or any SCIM client) uses to push user lifecycle events into this tenant.
scim.howTo: Set up Azure AD enterprise app provisioning
scim.step1: In Azure Portal → Enterprise Applications → New application → Create your own (Non-gallery).
scim.step2: Open the app, go to Provisioning → Set Mode to Automatic.
scim.step3: Paste the Tenant URL above and a token issued here. Click Test connection.
scim.step4: Map userPrincipalName → userName, mailNickname → externalId, then turn provisioning On.
scim.noTokensDesc: Create your first SCIM token to allow Azure AD to push users.
scim.name: Name
scim.issueHelp: Choose a label so you can identify which provisioner this token belongs to.
scim.savedBody: We do not store the plaintext — copy it into Azure AD and never share it. You can revoke it from this page at any time.

admin.title: Tenant Studio
admin.subtitle: Configure how your organization sees the product.
admin.previewLabel: How your users will see it
admin.dashboardWidgetsHelp: Drag to reorder. These appear on every user's home screen.
admin.sidebarModulesHelp: Hide modules your tenant doesn't need.
admin.hkoEnabledHelp: Auto-suspend no-show penalties when T8 / Black Rain is active.
admin.govhkHolidaysHelp: Nightly sync from the official 1823 calendar.
admin.savedDesc: Your changes are live for everyone in this tenant.

resources.title: Resources
resources.subtitle: Rooms, vehicles, equipment, and split / composite spaces.
resources.confirmDeactivate: Deactivate this resource? It will be hidden from new bookings.
resources.saveFirst: Save the parent resource before splitting.
resources.alreadySplit: This is a composite/parent resource. Sub-resources are managed separately.
resources.name: Name
resources.emptyDesc: Create the first room, vehicle, or equipment item.
resources.compositeHelp: Mark this as a parent that can be sub-divided (e.g. a basketball court split into 3 badminton courts). Booking the parent blocks all children, and vice versa.
resources.childNamesHelp: Press Enter or click + to add each name
resources.bookingModeHelp: Exclusive — only one booking holds the resource per slot. Shared — up to N concurrent bookings (gym = 10, classroom = 20).
resources.sharedCapacityHelp: Maximum number of overlapping bookings allowed for the same time window.

resourceTypes.title: Resource types
resourceTypes.subtitle: Define the asset taxonomy for your tenant. Built-ins ship with sensible defaults; you can also add your own (Gym, Studio, Boat, Drone…).
resourceTypes.empty: No resource types yet — create your first one
resourceTypes.label: Display label
resourceTypes.confirmDelete: Delete this resource type? Existing resources keep their type but new options will hide it.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage who can sign in and what role they hold.
users.confirmDeactivate: Deactivate this user? They won't be able to sign in.

departments.title: Departments
departments.subtitle: Organisational units for grouping resources and reporting.
departments.name: Name

holidays.title: Holidays
holidays.subtitle: Block bookings on public holidays. Sync from gov.hk or upload an ICS file.
holidays.blockerHelp: Block new bookings on this date

bookings.title: Bookings
bookings.subtitle: View and manage all bookings across your resources.
bookings.emptyDesc: There are no bookings matching your current filters.
